purpose: State file for the daily GarageScape SEO task. Each run reads this, does the day's work, and appends an entry.

runs.notes: First Bow Valley page — biggest coverage gap (Canmore/Banff had zero pages). SERP check showed no dedicated local competitor page (mostly garage-door companies and California Closets). Angle: mountain gear storage (ski/bike/climbing), wildlife-smart attractant storage, chinook/freeze-thaw moisture, small townhome garages. LocalBusiness + FAQPage + Breadcrumb schema (no invented reviews — aggregateRating omitted). Linked TO garage-organization-calgary, garage-storage-solutions-calgary, garage-cleaning-calgary, spring-garage-cleanout-calgary, decluttering city pages. Linked FROM index.html locations grid (new Canmore card). sitemap.xml updated.

runs.notes: Target chosen over stale seo-log flag: Aspen Woods was already rewritten to 1715 words with luxury angle in an earlier commit (flag corrected). Weakest high-value page was garage-decluttering-calgary.html at 796 words on a CORE keyword. Expanded 796->1787 words: why-Calgary-garages-fill-up (4-season gear, chinook freeze-thaw slab damage, -30 parking stakes), decluttering-vs-junk-removal differentiation (SERP is dominated by junk haulers - Taskrabbit, Western Junk Removal, Junk PROS), where-stuff-goes (donation/recycling/City of Calgary hazardous waste), Calgary decluttering calendar (chinook windows / spring reset / Sept-Oct beat-the-freeze), beyond-Calgary section. New ~55-char title, ~155-char meta, OpenGraph tags added, 3 new FAQs (visible + FAQPage schema), REMOVED unverified aggregateRating (5 stars / 47 reviews) from LocalBusiness schema per no-invented-reviews rule, 14 unique internal links incl. Canmore/Aspen Woods/spring-cleanout/city pages. Sitemap lastmod 2026-07-15. Live 200 verified post-deploy. NOTE: other pages may also carry invented aggregateRating blocks - worth auditing on a future Sunday technical run.

runs.keyword: garage organization Springbank Hill / custom garage cabinets Springbank Hill / epoxy garage floor Springbank
runs.notes: First target from next_targets (west Calgary luxury). SERP check: no dedicated Springbank Hill page exists anywhere - only generic Calgary garage companies (The Garage Store, California Closets, Garage Living, Dream Garage Makeovers). Angle deliberately DISTINCT from adjacent Aspen Woods page (which covers RV/boat zoning, large-garage declutters, workshops): Springbank Hill = builder-basic unfinished garages in estate homes, third-bay trap in triple garages, custom cabinets/slatwall at estate finish level, epoxy showroom floors (floor-first process), mudroom-to-garage overflow systems. Local texture: Elveden/Timberline/The Slopes/Springborough/Spring Valley sub-areas, 85th St SW new builds, Westside Rec Centre, Rundle College/Webber Academy, Highway 8 mountain access, chinook freeze-thaw slab damage on the exposed west ridge. 1649 words, 1 H1, title 49 chars, meta 158 chars, canonical + OG + Twitter, LocalBusiness + FAQPage + Breadcrumb JSON-LD (all validated, NO invented reviews/ratings), 15 internal links incl. aspen-woods (x3), renovation, storage-solutions, calgary flagship, canmore. Linked FROM index.html (new Springbank Hill location card). sitemap.xml: new entry lastmod 2026-07-16, homepage lastmod bumped.

runs.keyword: garage organization South Calgary / garage organization Lake Bonavista / garage organization Mahogany
runs.notes: Rescued weakest directional page (788 words -> 1462 words). Angle deliberately distinct from McKenzie Towne (lane-garage page), Aspen Woods, and Springbank Hill (SW luxury pages): South Calgary as THREE garage types - (1) rear-lane new-urbanism SE garages, (2) lake-community garages (Lake Bonavista/Mahogany/Auburn Bay/Chaparral/Sundance/McKenzie Lake - paddleboard/kayak racks, skate storage, two-swap seasonal calendar), (3) estate doubles/triples in Signal Hill/Legacy/Walden/Silverado. This folds the priority-audience 'lake & executive communities' angle into the existing hub instead of creating a near-duplicate new page. Local texture: Fish Creek Provincial Park + Sikome Lake, Macleod/Deerfoot/Stoney salt commutes, chinook freeze-thaw slab damage, April-May and Sept-Oct swap windows. New 57-char title, 150-char meta, REMOVED invented aggregateRating (5/47) from LocalBusiness schema (same violation pattern as decluttering page - Sunday audit still needed), expanded areaServed, 3 new FAQs (visible + FAQPage schema, now 7 in schema), added sticky call banner to match newer site design, new sections use existing decluttering-benefits/benefit-item classes. Internal links added: springbank-hill (x3 - new page needed inbound links), storage-solutions in body, aspen-woods, cleaning, spring-cleanout. Page already linked FROM garage-organization-calgary.html hub. Sitemap lastmod 2026-07-17. All 3 JSON-LD blocks validated, 1 H1, all internal hrefs verified to exist. NOTE: visible testimonials on this page (Chris & Dana W., Andrea M., Tom & Liz F.) are pre-existing and unverified - left in place per never-delete-without-flagging rule; flagging here for Abhi to confirm or replace with real reviews.

runs.keyword: garage organization Bearspaw / shop organization Bearspaw / acreage garage storage Rocky View County
runs.notes: First target from next_targets (acreage/estate outskirts priority audience). SERP check: zero dedicated Bearspaw garage-organization pages exist - results are garage-door contractors (Koomen), junk removal (1-800-GOT-JUNK, JustJunk), big-box retail (Costco/Home Depot), and generic Alberta California Closets. Angle deliberately DISTINCT from all existing pages: acreage square-footage paradox (attached triple/quad + detached shop yet vehicles outside), zone-by-building method, detached shops/quonsets/outbuildings, RV-trailer-boat parking plans (storage-yard-tax argument), vehicle lifts and collector bays, acreage equipment rotation (tractor/snowblower/mower), gravel-dust + west-wind + chinook slab damage. Local texture: Watermark at Bearspaw, Church Ranches, Bearspaw Country Estates, Lynx Ridge, Bearspaw Pointe, Bearspaw Road / Glendale Road, Highway 1A to Cochrane, 12 Mile Coulee, Bearspaw Lifestyle Centre. 1834 words, 1 H1, title 49 chars, meta 157 chars, canonical + OG + Twitter, LocalBusiness + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD all validated (NO invented reviews/ratings), internal links: cochrane, north-calgary, calgary flagship, canmore, springbank-hill, storage-solutions, renovation + services/blog. Linked FROM index.html (new Bearspaw location card in locations grid). sitemap.xml: new entry lastmod 2026-07-18, homepage lastmod bumped. All internal hrefs verified to exist; sitemap parsed valid with 41 URLs, no duplicates.

runs.notes: MAJOR FIX - host mismatch found and corrected: live site serves on https://www.garagescape.ca (apex garagescape.ca 307-redirects to www via Vercel), but ALL 50 canonical tags, all OG/Twitter URLs, all JSON-LD url fields, all sitemap <loc> entries, and the robots.txt Sitemap line pointed at the redirecting apex host. Canonicals/sitemap URLs pointing through a redirect are a likely major contributor to the historical 46-not-indexed problem. Normalized every URL sitewide to www (510 refs). Completed the flagged aggregateRating audit: removed fabricated blocks (5 stars, review counts 22-134) from 28 pages per no-invented-reviews rule. Deduped sitemaps: blog.html + blog/hire-vs-diy appeared in both sitemap.xml and sitemap-blog.xml; removed from sitemap.xml. Validated post-fix: all JSON-LD blocks parse (0 errors), sitemap.xml 39 URLs + sitemap-blog.xml 10 URLs map 1:1 to live pages with no dupes, sitemap-index.xml references both, robots.txt sane, 0 broken internal links sitewide, exactly one H1 per page. Live verification after deploy: homepage, sitemap.xml, calgary flagship, bearspaw, robots.txt all 200; live sitemap serves www URLs; aggregateRating confirmed gone from live pages.
